## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages from the UI or server logs.

## Environment

- ZFS version (`zfs version`):

- Browser (if UI issue):
